$template_notes: This document is both a summary of the LIBS Foundation Model and a reusable template.
To adapt it to a new project: keep the top-level keys, replace the values inside each section,
and prune sections that do not apply. Sections marked with '$template' contain guidance only;
remove or replace them when filling in a real project.
All filesystem paths are RELATIVE to the project root unless explicitly absolute.
Use shape strings like '[N, n_bins]' for tensor/array shapes.

project_metadata.name: libs-foundation-model
project_metadata.description: Self-supervised LIBS foundation model (BERT-style transformer) on physics-based Voigt spectra. Supports bin (intensity) embedding, runtime line-token embedding (LineTokenEmbedding), and pre-baked line-token-linear embedding (nn.Linear on 14-feature HDF5 tokens from data/line_tokenization.py).
project_metadata.$template_hint: Set name/description/version/license to match the new project. `package_manager` may be 'uv' | 'pip' | 'poetry' | 'conda'.

core_dependencies.name: h5py
core_dependencies.purpose: HDF5 cache for the LIBS pipeline

core_dependencies.name: omegaconf
core_dependencies.purpose: (Imported via deps; reserved for richer config support)

embedding_modes.name: intensity
embedding_modes.sequence: n_bins wavelength bins + CLS (~17429 with libs pipeline)
embedding_modes.pretrain_objective: Masked Intensity Prediction (MIP) on bin intensities

embedding_modes.name: line_token
embedding_modes.pretrain_objective: Masked line-feature prediction (max_I, FWHM channels); invalid Voigt fits masked via key_padding_mask

embedding_modes.name: line_token_linear
embedding_modes.cli: --line_embedding_config (defaults to line_token_linear when set without explicit embedding_type)
embedding_modes.sequence: n_lines + CLS; training reads line_tokens_{hash}.h5 only
embedding_modes.pretrain_objective: Masked MIP on max_intensity + FWHM (channels 9,10 in token tensor)
embedding_modes.notes: Tokenization is a separate offline step (scripts/build_line_tokens.py). Training z-scores raw features using attrs feature_mean/std.

embedding_line_token.fit_features: 5 Voigt-fit features (max_I, FWHM, R2, delta_lambda, RMSE)

outputs.mip_predictions: bin intensities or line features depending on mode

pretrain_objectives.name: Masked line-feature MIP
pretrain_objectives.loss: MSE on masked max_I and FWHM (channels 0,1)

pretrain_objectives.name: Masked token MIP
pretrain_objectives.loss: MSE on masked max_intensity and FWHM (token channels 9, 10)

input_line_token_linear_mode.fit_valid: [B, n_lines] uint8 separate dataset for key_padding_mask
input_line_token_linear_mode.categorical_encoding: atomic_number (Z) + ion_binary (0=I, 1=II+); no nn.Embedding at train time

embedding_line_token_linear.input: 14 raw float features per line from line_tokens HDF5
embedding_line_token_linear.normalization: z-score at load using feature_mean / feature_std in HDF5 attrs

entry_points.purpose: Generate or load spectra, build masked dataset, train transformer with MIP, save checkpoints.

cli.description: Line-token mode: Te/Ne grid, threshold, Voigt-fit settings.

entry_points.purpose: Load encoder from a pretrain run, attach task head(s), fine-tune on labeled data.
Auto-detect mode from run_dir, run inference on a held-out test set, render figures + metrics.

cli.description: Auto from run_dir name if omitted.

entry_points.purpose: Discover runs and print summaries / details.
Sanity-check the physics-based LIBS pipeline (Te/Ne in range, concentrations sum to 1, plot batch).

model_training_configs.use_case: Smoke-test wiring for the physics pipeline.
Real-LIBS sanity run on RTX 4090 (24 GB).
Real-LIBS full run on A100 80 GB.

data.n_bins: int (overridden at runtime when --libs_data_config is set)

persistence.config_copy: Source YAML is copied verbatim into {run_dir}/config.yaml by RunManager._copy_config.
persistence.pipeline_config: libs_data.yaml is referenced (not copied) and recorded in run_info.yaml under libs_data_config.
persistence.pipeline_cache: External data is cached to external_data/cache/synthetic_cache_{md5}.h5 keyed by the generation config hash; matching splits live in splits_{md5}.json.
persistence.line_embedding_config: Referenced in run_info.yaml; line caches under external_data/cache/line_dict_*.h5 and line_features_*.h5

classes.name: MaskedLIBSDataset
classes.role: MIP dataset with multiple masking strategies + 80/10/10 replacement + masking stats.

classes.name: LineTokensDataset
classes.role: Reads tokens + fit_valid from line_tokens HDF5.

functions.name: libs_worker_init_fn
functions.role: Per-worker numpy RNG re-seed for reproducible masking across epochs.

classes.name: SyntheticLIBSDataset
classes.role: Materialises physics-based spectra and caches them to HDF5.

functions.name: load_wavelength
functions.role: Read wavelength axis from VASKUT JSON.

functions.name: load_sample_types
functions.role: Parse the sample matrix XLSX into sample-type dicts.

functions.name: create_spectra
functions.role: Vectorised Voigt-profile synthesis for one shot.

functions.name: cluster_compositions
functions.role: K-means cluster labels on concentration vectors.

functions.name: get_or_make_splits
functions.role: Deterministic train/val/test split cached beside spectra.

classes.name: SpectralEmbedding
classes.role: Intensity projection + CLS + mask token + positional encoding + LayerNorm.

classes.name: TransformerEncoderBlock
classes.role: PreNorm MHA + FFN with residual connections.

classes.name: LIBSTransformer
classes.role: SpectralEmbedding or LineTokenEmbedding; key_padding_mask for invalid lines.

classes.name: BinnedQuantificationHead
classes.role: One MLP branch per element producing n_bins logits.

functions.name: concentration_to_bin
functions.role: Map float concentration in [0,1] to bin index in [0, n_bins-1].

classes.name: LIBSPretrainModule
classes.role: Lightning module for MIP. AdamW + cosine + linear warmup. Loss on all 15% of masked bins.

classes.name: PretrainDataModule
classes.role: Wraps MaskedLIBSDataset. Logs masking statistics at setup time.

classes.name: LIBSFinetuneModule
classes.role: Lightning module with task dispatch (classification | quantification | quantification_binned | both). Encoder LR = 0.1 * head LR. Pool = cls | mean | cls_mean.

classes.name: RunManager
classes.role: Owns the on-disk layout of a run. Copies config, manages directories, persists run_info.yaml, and resolves the best checkpoint for a given mode.

functions.name: list_runs
functions.role: List run directories, optionally filtered by type.

functions.name: find_latest_run
functions.role: Return the most recently modified run.

data.line_dictionary.role: Theoretical intensities over Te×Ne; default per-element top-percent selection with legacy threshold mode.

data.line_features.role: Voigt fits per spectrum per line; 6 channels including fit_valid.

classes.name: LineTokenEmbedding
classes.role: Runtime concat: quantum + element/ion nn.Embedding + fit features -> MLP -> d_model.

classes.name: LinearLineTokenEmbedding
classes.role: Pre-baked tokens: z-score + nn.Linear(14, d_model) + wavelength PE.

data.line_tokenization.role: Offline tokenization: dict + Voigt -> 14-feature tensor per line per spectrum.

file_relationships.$key: Each entry: { source: file, imports: [{module, symbols}], reads/writes: [paths] }

data_flow.pretrain_path_line_token: LineFeaturesStore -> MaskedLineTokenDataset -> LineTokenEmbedding -> masked max_I/FWHM MIP
data_flow.finetune_path: Labeled / LineTokenLabeled -> pooled encoder -> task heads
data_flow.pretrain_path_line_token_linear: line_tokens HDF5 -> MaskedLineTokensDataset -> LinearLineTokenEmbedding -> masked max_I/FWHM MIP

steps.name: Pre-train bin (smoke)
steps.command: uv run python train_pretrain.py --config config/config_libs_smoke.yaml --libs_data_config config/libs_data_smoke.yaml

steps.name: Pre-train bin (4090)
steps.command: uv run python train_pretrain.py --config config/config_libs_4090.yaml --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --experiment_name libs_bin --num_workers 4

steps.name: Pre-train line-token (4090)
steps.command: uv run python train_pretrain.py --config config/config_libs_token_4090.yaml --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --line_embedding_config config/line_embedding.yaml --experiment_name libs_line --num_workers 4

steps.name: Fine-tune binned (bin)
steps.command: uv run python train_finetune.py --config config/config_libs_4090.yaml --pretrain_run_dir runs/pretrain_<ts> --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --task quantification_binned --pool cls_mean

steps.name: Fine-tune binned (line-token)
steps.command: uv run python train_finetune.py --config config/config_libs_token_4090.yaml --pretrain_run_dir runs/pretrain_<ts> --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --line_embedding_config config/line_embedding.yaml --task quantification_binned --pool cls_mean

steps.name: Build line tokens cache (optional standalone)
steps.command: uv run python scripts/build_line_tokens.py --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --line_embedding_config config/line_embedding.yaml

steps.name: Build line tokens (standalone)
steps.command: uv run python scripts/build_line_tokens.py --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --line_embedding_config config/line_embedding.yaml

steps.name: Pre-train line_token_linear (4090)
steps.command: uv run python train_pretrain.py --config config/config_libs_token_linear_4090.yaml --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --line_embedding_config config/line_embedding.yaml --experiment_name libs_token_linear --num_workers 4

steps.name: Fine-tune binned (line_token_linear)
steps.command: uv run python train_finetune.py --config config/config_libs_token_linear_4090.yaml --pretrain_run_dir runs/pretrain_<ts> --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --line_embedding_config config/line_embedding.yaml --task quantification_binned --pool cls_mean

callbacks.name: SaveRawModelCallback
callbacks.purpose: Save plain encoder state_dict each epoch (pretrain).

callbacks.name: SaveRawEncoderCallback
callbacks.purpose: Save plain encoder state_dict each epoch (finetune).

console_output: Masking statistics printed by PretrainDataModule.setup (avg masked bins, peak coverage, ...).
Configuration dump for pretrain (mask ratio, block sizes, peak bias).

pretrain_artifacts.description: 6 sample spectra: original vs predicted, masked regions shaded.
Error histogram, error-vs-true-intensity bar chart, predicted-vs-true scatter (R^2), per-class MAE.
t-SNE of CLS embeddings colored by material class.
MSE, RMSE, MAE, R^2 over masked positions.

finetune_artifacts.description: Confusion matrix + per-class accuracy + summary box.
2x3 scatter grid (per-element predicted vs true) + summary box.

slurm_jobs.inner_command: uv run python train_pretrain.py --config config/config_libs_a100.yaml --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --experiment_name libs_pretrain_a100 --num_workers 4

uv run python train_finetune.py --config config/config_libs_a100.yaml --pretrain_run_dir $PRETRAIN_RUN --libs_data_config config/libs_data.yaml --task quantification_binned --pool cls_mean --experiment_name libs_binned_q_a100 --num_workers 4

files_required_for_libs_data_pipeline.purpose: Atomic line database for spectrum synthesis.
Per-sample-type concentration ranges (one row per type, columns = elements).
Wavelength axis for the simulated detector.

cache.purpose: Materialised spectra + sample_table; reused when generation config hash matches.
Train/val/test index split tied to the spectra cache.
Pre-baked per-spectrum token tensors [n_spectra, n_lines, 14] + fit_valid + norm stats; training input for line_token_linear.

glossary.MIP: Masked Intensity Prediction - the self-supervised objective: reconstruct masked intensities from context.
glossary.BERT 80/10/10: Of the masked positions: 80% become a learnable mask token, 10% a random intensity, 10% are left unchanged.
glossary.Peak-biased masking: A configurable fraction of masked bins is forced to overlap intensity peaks (threshold + +/-5-bin shoulder).
glossary.Run: A single training execution; lives in runs/{type}_{timestamp}_{experiment}/.
glossary.libs_data pipeline: Physics-based Voigt synthesis (Daveboarder/Element_Identification heritage), opted in via --libs_data_config.
glossary.Pool: How encoder outputs feed downstream heads: cls (CLS only), mean (over bins), cls_mean (concat; head input = 2*d_model).
glossary.Line-token embedding: One transformer token per retained emission line with Voigt-fit and quantum features.
glossary.Line dictionary: Theoretical lines selected on a Te×Ne grid (default: top 10% per element, keep all if <10; legacy threshold mode available).
glossary.Line tokens cache: line_tokens_{hash}.h5: combined quantum + Voigt features per line, written by data/line_tokenization.py.
glossary.line_token_linear: Embedding mode that reads pre-baked tokens and applies nn.Linear(14, d_model) after z-score normalization.
glossary.Separated tokenization: Voigt fitting and feature assembly happen offline; training only loads HDF5 tokens (like synthetic_cache for spectra).

minimal_replacement_steps: 3) Rewrite `architecture` to describe the new model and tasks.
4) Rebuild `project_layout.tree` from the new repo structure.
5) List CLI scripts under `entry_points` (one object per script).
6) Describe YAML configs under `configurations` and their `runtime_overrides`.
7) Fill `modules` with one block per top-level package; keep classes/functions short.
9) Adjust `logging` to match the actual logger backends and metric keys.
11) Keep or drop `deployment` based on whether SLURM/containerization is used.
fields_typically_dropped_for_other_proje: configurations.data_pipeline_configs (if no separate data pipeline YAML)
